detaileddescription.para: Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.
Ensure enum is represented as 32 bits.

briefdescription.para: System gesture classification key pose type.
Static information about the gesture classification.

detaileddescription.para: Populate with MLGestureClassificationGetStaticData(). This structure must be initialized by calling MLGestureClassificationStaticDataInit() before use.

briefdescription.para: System gesture classification key pose type.
Gesture classification posture related finger data.

detaileddescription.para: Pinch values are measured between the finger and thumb. In case thumb is the finger, values are same with index's values.

briefdescription.para: Gesture classification state of a single finger.
Gesture classification state of a single hand.
Data which is received when querying tracker from MLGestureClassificationGetData().

detaileddescription.para: This structure must be initialized by calling MLGestureClassificationDataInit() before use.

parameterdescription.para: The object to initialize with default settings.
The object to initialize with default settings.
A handle to the created gesture classification tracker. Only valid if the return value is MLResult_Ok.
Failed to create a tracker due to an invalid parameter.
The tracker was created successfully.
Perception System has not been started.
The application lacks privilege.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.
A handle to a gesture classification tracker created by MLGestureClassificationCreate().
Failed to destroy a tracker due to an invalid parameter.
It successfully destroyed the tracker.
Perception System has not been started.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Gets static information about the gesture classification.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to a gesture classification tracker created by MLGestureClassificationCreate().
Target to populate the data about the gesture classification.
Failed to get static data due to an invalid parameter.
Gesture classification static data was successfully received.
Perception System has not been started.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.

briefdescription.para: Queries the state of the gesture classification.

parameterdescription.para: A handle to a gesture classification tracker created by MLGestureClassificationCreate().
Pointer to MLGestureClassificationData structure.
Failed to retrieve data due to an invalid parameter.
The state information was available and the information in out_data is valid.
Perception System has not been started.
The operation failed with an unspecified error.
